channel.title: Androscoggin County Registry of Deeds
channel.description: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. No news section; monitors hours/fee/contact content.

item.title: Monitoring started: Androscoggin County Registry of Deeds
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
